events.summaryZh: Parramatta Square 这场冬季夜游把 firepits、immersive cinema、小吃和现场娱乐集中在一起，傍晚去更有节日感，适合全家轻松逛一圈。
events.summaryEn: Parramatta Square turns into a winter night-out with firepits, immersive cinema, food and entertainment, making it an easy family outing rather than a kid-only session.
events.priceZh: 免费为主，部分活动购票
events.priceEn: Free event with some ticketed events
events.referenceZh: AtParramatta / City of Parramatta 官方活动页面。
events.referenceEn: AtParramatta / City of Parramatta official event listing.

events.summaryZh: Convention Forecourt 两天免费 winter hub 有寻宝、手作、dance den 和 games area，不只是坐着看，适合孩子放电，大人也能顺路在 Darling Harbour 吃饭散步。
events.summaryEn: This free two-day winter hub has a scavenger hunt, craft camp, dance den and games area, so kids can move around while adults can pair it with an easy Darling Harbour meal or walk.
events.mapQuery: Convention Forecourt 14 Darling Drive Darling Harbour
events.referenceZh: Darling Harbour 官方 Arctic Activity Zone 页面。
events.referenceEn: Darling Harbour official Arctic Activity Zone page.

events.summaryZh: Maritime Museum 免费开放日把文化活动、现场表演、art-making、tours、workshops 和 storytelling 放在同一天，室内外都好安排，适合边玩边认识 First Nations 文化。
events.summaryEn: This free Maritime Museum open day brings cultural activities, live performances, art-making, tours, workshops and storytelling into one easy visit, with a stronger family-outing feel than a single workshop.
events.placeZh: Australian National Maritime Museum, 2 Murray Street
events.placeEn: Australian National Maritime Museum, 2 Murray Street
events.mapQuery: Australian National Maritime Museum 2 Murray Street Sydney
events.referenceZh: Darling Harbour / Australian National Maritime Museum 官方活动页面。
events.referenceEn: Darling Harbour / Australian National Maritime Museum official event page.

events.summaryZh: Blacktown LGA 的 NAIDOC 周活动覆盖 community、culture、sport 和 kids & family 场次，适合西区家庭按地点和时间挑一场参与。
events.summaryEn: Blacktown LGA's NAIDOC Week program covers community, culture, sport and kids-and-family sessions, giving western Sydney families several concrete options to choose by suburb and time.
events.referenceZh: Blacktown City Council 官方活动页面。
events.referenceEn: Blacktown City Council official event listing.

events.summaryZh: Penrith 免费社区日有表演、文化工作坊、market stalls、talks、free BBQ、sport 和 First Nations food trucks，内容密度高，适合开车去过一个热闹半日。
events.summaryEn: This free Penrith community day packs performances, cultural workshops, market stalls, talks, a free BBQ, sport and First Nations food trucks into one bigger family half-day.
events.referenceZh: Penrith City Council 官方活动页面。
events.referenceEn: Penrith City Council official event listing.

events.summaryZh: Palm Grove open-air ice rink 有企鹅辅助架、冬季小吃和 harbourfront 氛围，滑冰本身好玩，也容易接 Darling Harbour 吃饭散步。
events.summaryEn: The Palm Grove open-air rink has penguin skating aids, winter treats and a harbourfront setting, making it easy to turn skating into a Darling Harbour half-day.
events.placeZh: Palm Grove Forecourt, outside IMAX Sydney
events.placeEn: Palm Grove Forecourt, outside IMAX Sydney
events.priceZh: 儿童 $20 起，家庭票 $75；以官网为准
events.priceEn: Children from $20, family ticket $75; check official pricing
events.mapQuery: Palm Grove Forecourt IMAX Sydney Darling Harbour
events.referenceZh: Darling Harbour 官方 ice rink 页面。
events.referenceEn: Darling Harbour official ice rink page.

events.summaryZh: 这场 55 分钟音乐剧把故事、physical theatre、music 和 puppetry 放在一起，对 3 岁以上友好，也适合大人陪着轻松看完。
events.summaryEn: This 55-minute theatre show mixes story, physical theatre, music and puppetry, making it a manageable sit-down outing for ages 3+ and accompanying adults.
events.mapQuery: Darling Quarter Theatre 1-25 Harbour Street Sydney
events.referenceZh: Darling Harbour / Darling Quarter Theatre 官方活动页面。
events.referenceEn: Darling Harbour / Darling Quarter Theatre official event page.

events.summaryZh: 沉浸式哈利波特主题展适合想找室内备选的家庭，内容更像长期展览，所以放在短期活动之后作为雨天或粉丝选项。
events.summaryEn: This immersive Harry Potter exhibition works well as an indoor backup for fans or rainy days, but it sits after the shorter-date picks because it is a longer-running show.
events.timeZh: 持续开放，出发前确认当日时段
events.timeEn: Ongoing; confirm the day's session before visiting
events.referenceZh: Harry Potter: The Exhibition Sydney 官方页面。
events.referenceEn: Harry Potter: The Exhibition Sydney official page.
